events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Lionel Richie, the iconic singer-songwriter known for hits like "Hello" and "All Night Long," celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Lionel Richie Birthday
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a solo superstar, Lionel Richie turns 77 today! Which of his timeless tracks is your go-to?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy Award-winning artist Cyndi Lauper, celebrated for her distinctive voice and hits like "Girls Just Want to Have Fun," turns 73 today.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright and proving girls really just want to have fun. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63 today, known for his incredible songwriting and hits both with Wham! and as a solo artist.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the extraordinary talent of George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move us. What's your favourite George Michael moment?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died at the age of 50 in 2009.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Tribute
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and iconic moves continue to define generations. What's the MJ track that always gets you moving?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is undeniable. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, turns 79 today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs with Queen are truly out of this world. What's your favourite Queen anthem?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, the incomparable Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track that makes you want to dance?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star," forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and video officially 'killed' the radio star! What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' release
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your top track from this iconic album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, '3 Days of Peace & Music' began at Woodstock. What's the one performance you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King, Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost him. His legacy in music is truly unmatched. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the unparalleled guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we lost a true legend, Jimi Hendrix. His impact on music, particularly the electric guitar, is still felt today. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring the famous zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, a masterpiece that still captivates fans today.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius! What's your favourite moment from their penultimate LP?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The influential lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll pioneer with The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a formidable solo artist, Liam Gallagher, turns 54 today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or with Oasis?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, continuing to inspire generations with its message of peace.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... living for today! John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single 55 years ago this month. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod launch
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple unveiled the first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music with "1,000 songs in your pocket."

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago this month, Apple put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is International James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, 007 is pure cinematic gold. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond song?
